sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الْمُسَافِرُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ الدَّوْلِيِّ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Putnik je stigao na međunarodni aerodrom rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The traveler arrived at the international airport early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْجَوَازَاتِ لِيَخْتِمَ جَوَازَ سَفَرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je do šaltera za pasoše kako bi mu udarili pečat u pasoš.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the passport office to get his passport stamped.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، انْتَظَرَ حَقِيبَتَهُ عِنْدَ مَكَانِ اسْتِلَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga, čekao je svoj kofer na mjestu za preuzimanje prtljaga.
sentences.translationEn: After that, he waited for his suitcase at the baggage claim.

sentences.arabic: خَرَجَ مِنَ الْمَطَارِ وَرَكِبَ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Izašao je s aerodroma i ušao u taksi kako bi otišao do hotela.
sentences.translationEn: He left the airport and took a taxi to go to the hotel.

sentences.translation: Putovanje je bilo dugo, ali udobno.
sentences.translationEn: The trip was long but comfortable.
